TemplateInput {\n+  return {\n+    language: manifest.language,\n+    autoMode: manifest.autoMode,\n+    provider: manifest.provider,\n+    version: manifest.installedVersion\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+export function createProjectManifest(rootDir: string, options: InitOptions = {}): ProjectManifest {\n+  return {\n+    schemaVersion: 1,\n+    projectName: path.basename(rootDir),\n+    rootDir,\n+    provider: options.provider ?? \"codex\",\n+    language: options.language ?? \"ko\",\n+    autoMode: options.autoMode ?? \"on\",\n+    installedVersion: PGG_VERSION,\n+    updatedAt: nowIso(),\n+    dashboard: {\n+      defaultPort: 4173\n+    },\n+    managedFiles: []\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+export async function loadProjectManifest(rootDir: string): Promise<ProjectManifest | null> {\n+  const raw = await readTextIfExists(manifestPath(rootDir));\n+  if (!raw) {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+\n+  return JSON.parse(raw) as ProjectManifest;\n+}\n+\n+export async function saveProjectManifest(rootDir: string, manifest: ProjectManifest): Promise<void> {\n+  const target = manifestPath(rootDir);\n+  await writeTextFile(target, `${JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2)}\\n`);\n+}\n+\n+export async function loadGlobalRegistry(): Promise<GlobalRegistry> {\n+  const raw = await readTextIfExists(registryPath());\n+  if (!raw) {\n+    return {\n+      version: 1,\n+      projects: []\n+    };\n+  }\n+\n+  return JSON.parse(raw) as GlobalRegistry;\n+}\n+\n+export async function saveGlobalRegistry(registry: GlobalRegistry): Promise<void> {\n+  const target = registryPath();\n+  await writeTextFile(target, `${JSON.stringify(registry, null, 2)}\\n`);\n+}\n+\n+export async function syncProject(rootDir: string, manifest: ProjectManifest): Promise<SyncResult> {\n+  const priorManaged = new Map(manifest.managedFiles.map((entry) => [entry.path, entry]));\n+  const templates = buildGeneratedFiles(buildTemplateInput(manifest));\n+  const created: string[] = [];\n+  const updated: string[] = [];\n+  const unchanged: string[] = [];\n+  const conflicts: SyncConflict[] = [];\n+  const nextManaged: ManagedFileRecord[] = [];\n+  const timestamp = nowIso();\n+\n+  for (const template of templates) {\n+    const target = path.join(rootDir, template.path);\n+    const current = await readTextIfExists(target);\n+    const nextChecksum = checksum(template.content);\n+    const previousManaged = priorManaged.get(template.path);\n+\n+    if (\n+      current !== null &&\n+      previousManaged &&\n+      checksum(current) !== previousManaged.checksum &&\n+      current !== template.content\n+    ) {\n+      const backupPath = path.join(\n+        rootDir,\n+        \".pgg\",\n+        \"backups\",\n+        `${timestamp.replaceAll(\":\", \"-\")}-${sanitizeFileName(template.path)}`\n+      );\n+      await writeTextFile(backupPath, current);\n+      conflicts.push({\n+        path: template.path,\n+        backupPath: path.relative(rootDir, backupPath)\n+      });\n+    }\n+\n+    if (current === null) {\n+      await writeTextFile(target, template.content);\n+      created.push(template.path);\n+    } else if (current !== template.content) {\n+      await writeTextFile(target, template.content);\n+      updated.push(template.path);\n+    } else {\n+      unchanged.push(template.path);\n+    }\n+\n+    if (template.executable) {\n+      await chmod(target, 0o755);\n+    }\n+\n+    nextManaged.push({\n+      path: template.path,\n+      checksum: nextChecksum,\n+      executable: template.executable ?? false\n+    });\n+  }\n+\n+  const nextManifest: ProjectManifest = {\n+    ...manifest,\n+    installedVersion: PGG_VERSION,\n+    updatedAt: timestamp,\n+    managedFiles: nextManaged\n+  };\n+\n+  await saveProjectManifest(rootDir, nextManifest);\n+\n+  return {\n+    manifest: nextManifest,\n+    created,\n+    updated,\n+    unchanged,\n+    conflicts\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+export async function registerProject(manifest: ProjectManifest): Promise<GlobalRegistry> {\n+  const registry = await loadGlobalRegistry();\n+  const nextEntry: RegistryProjectEntry = {\n+    id: stableProjectId(manifest.rootDir),\n+    name: manifest.projectName,\n+    rootDir: manifest.rootDir,\n+    provider: manifest.provider,\n+    language: manifest.language,\n+    autoMode: manifest.autoMode,\n+    lastOpenedAt: nowIso()\n+  };\n+\n+  const projects = registry.projects.filter((entry) => entry.rootDir !== manifest.rootDir);\n+  projects.unshift(nextEntry);\n+\n+  const nextRegistry: GlobalRegistry = {\n+    ...registry,\n+    projects\n+  };\n+\n+  await saveGlobalRegistry(nextRegistry);\n+  return nextRegistry;\n+}\n+\n+export async function initializeProject(rootDir: string, options: InitOptions = {}): Promise<SyncResult> {\n+  const manifest = createProjectManifest(rootDir, options);\n+  const syncResult = await syncProject(rootDir, manifest);\n+  await registerProject(syncResult.manifest);\n+  return syncResult;\n+}\n+\n+async function requireManifest(rootDir: string): Promise<ProjectManifest> {\n+  const manifest = await loadProjectManifest(rootDir);\n+  if (!manifest) {\n+    throw new Error(\"Project is not initialized. Run `pgg init` first.\");\n+  }\n+\n+  return manifest;\n+}\n+\n+export async function updateProject(rootDir: string): Promise<SyncResult> {\n+  const manifest = await requireManifest(rootDir);\n+  const syncResult = await syncProject(rootDir, manifest);\n+  await registerProject(syncResult.manifest);\n+  return syncResult;\n+}\n+\n+export async function updateProjectLanguage(rootDir: string, language: PggLanguage): Promise<SyncResult> {\n+  const manifest = await requireManifest(rootDir);\n+  const syncResult = await syncProject(rootDir, { ...manifest, language });\n+  await registerProject(syncResult.manifest);\n+  return syncResult;\n+}\n+\n+export async function updateProjectAutoMode(rootDir: string, autoMode: PggAutoMode): Promise<SyncResult> {\n+  const manifest = await requireManifest(rootDir);\n+  const syncResult = await syncProject(rootDir, { ...manifest, autoMode });\n+  await registerProject(syncResult.manifest);\n+  return syncResult;\n+}\n+\n+function parseMarkdownSection(markdown: string, title: string): string | null {\n+  const escaped = title.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\]\\\\]/g, \"\\\\$&\");\n+  const pattern = new RegExp(`## ${escaped}\\\\n\\\\n([\\\\s\\\\S]*?)(?=\\\\n## |$)`);\n+  const match = markdown.match(pattern);\n+  if (!match?.[1]) {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+\n+  return match[1].trim();\n+}\n+\n+function parseKeyValue(markdown: string, key: string): string | null {\n+  const escaped = key.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\]\\\\]/g, \"\\\\$&\");\n+  const pattern = new RegExp(`^[ \\\\t]*${escaped}:\\\\s*\"?([^\"\\\\n]+)\"?`, \"m\");\n+  const match = markdown.match(pattern);\n+  return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? null;\n+}\n+\n+function parseScore(markdown: string): number | null {\n+  const section = parseMarkdownSection(markdown, \"Last Expert Score\");\n+  if (!section) {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+\n+  const match = section.match(/score:\\s*([0-9]+)/);\n+  return match ? Number(match[1]) : null;\n+}\n+\n+function parseBlockingIssues(markdown: string): string | null {\n+  const section = parseMarkdownSection(markdown, \"Last Expert Score\");\n+  if (!section) {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+\n+  const match = section.match(/blocking issues:\\s*(.+)/);\n+  return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? null;\n+}\n+\n+async function readWorkflow(filePath: string): Promise<WorkflowDocument | null> {\n+  const raw = await readTextIfExists(filePath);\n+  if (!raw) {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+\n+  try {\n+    return JSON.parse(raw) as WorkflowDocument;\n+  } catch {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+async function listTopicSummaries(rootDir: string, bucket: \"active\" | \"archive\"): Promise<TopicSummary[]> {\n+  const bucketDir = path.join(rootDir, \"poggn\", bucket);\n+  const entries = await readdir(bucketDir, { withFileTypes: true }).catch(() => []);\n+  const topics = entries.filter((entry) => entry.isDirectory()).sort((left, right) => left.name.localeCompare(right.name));\n+  const result: TopicSummary[] = [];\n+\n+  for (const entry of topics) {\n+    const topicDir = path.join(bucketDir, entry.name);\n+    const statePath = path.join(topicDir, \"state\", \"current.md\");\n+    const proposalPath = path.join(topicDir, \"proposal.md\");\n+    const stateMarkdown = await readTextIfExists(statePath);\n+    const proposalMarkdown = await readTextIfExists(proposalPath);\n+    const workflow = await readWorkflow(path.join(topicDir, \"workflow.reactflow.json\"));\n+    const stage = stateMarkdown ? parseMarkdownSection(stateMarkdown, \"Current Stage\") : parseKeyValue(proposalMarkdown ?? \"\", \"stage\");\n+    const goal = stateMarkdown ? parseMarkdownSection(stateMarkdown, \"Goal\") : null;\n+    const nextAction = stateMarkdown ? parseMarkdownSection(stateMarkdown, \"Next Action\") : null;\n+    const score = stateMarkdown ? parseScore(stateMarkdown) : null;\n+    const blockingIssues = stateMarkdown ? parseBlockingIssues(stateMarkdown) : null;\n+    const status = proposalMarkdown ? parseKeyValue(proposalMarkdown, \"status\") : null;\n+\n+    result.push({\n+      name: entry.name,\n+      bucket,\n+      stage,\n+      goal,\n+      nextAction,\n+      score,\n+      blockingIssues,\n+      status,\n+      workflow,\n+      health: stateMarkdown && workflow ? \"ok\" : \"partial\"\n+    });\n+  }\n+\n+  return result;\n+}\n+\n+export async function analyzeProject(rootDir: string, registered = false): Promise<ProjectSnapshot> {\n+  const missingRoot = !(await stat(rootDir).then(() => true).catch(() => false));\n+  if (missingRoot) {\n+    return {\n+      id: stableProjectId(rootDir),\n+      name: path.basename(rootDir),\n+      rootDir,\n+      registered,\n+      missingRoot: true,\n+      provider: \"codex\",\n+      language: \"ko\",\n+      autoMode: \"on\",\n+      installedVersion: null,\n+      hasAgents: false,\n+      hasCodex: false,\n+      hasPoggn: false,\n+      activeTopics: [],\n+      archivedTopics: []\n+    };\n+  }\n+\n+  const manifest = await loadProjectManifest(rootDir);\n+  const activeTopics = await listTopicSummaries(rootDir, \"active\");\n+  const archivedTopics = await listTopicSummaries(rootDir, \"archive\");\n+\n+  return {\n+    id: stableProjectId(rootDir),\n+    name: manifest?.projectName ?? path.basename(rootDir),\n+    rootDir,\n+    registered,\n+    missingRoot: false,\n+    provider: manifest?.provider ?? \"codex\",\n+    language: manifest?.language ?? \"ko\",\n+    autoMode: manifest?.autoMode ?? \"on\",\n+    installedVersion: manifest?.installedVersion ?? null,\n+    hasAgents: existsSync(path.join(rootDir, \"AGENTS.md\")),\n+    hasCodex: existsSync(path.join(rootDir, \".codex\")),\n+    hasPoggn: existsSync(path.join(rootDir, \"poggn\")),\n+    activeTopics,\n+    archivedTopics\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+export async function buildDashboardSnapshot(currentRootDir: string): Promise<DashboardSnapshot> {\n+  const registry = await loadGlobalRegistry();\n+  const dedupedPaths = new Map<string, boolean>();\n+  dedupedPaths.set(currentRootDir, registry.projects.some((entry) => entry.rootDir === currentRootDir));\n+  for (const entry of registry.projects) {\n+    if (!dedupedPaths.has(entry.rootDir)) {\n+      dedupedPaths.set(entry.rootDir, true);\n+    }\n+  }\n+\n+  const projects: ProjectSnapshot[] = [];\n+  for (const [rootDir, registered] of dedupedPaths.entries()) {\n+    projects.push(await analyzeProject(rootDir, registered));\n+  }\n+\n+  const currentProject = projects.find((project) => path.resolve(project.rootDir) === path.resolve(currentRootDir)) ?? null;\n+\n+  return {\n+    generatedAt: nowIso(),\n+    currentProjectId: currentProject?.id ?? null,\n+    projects\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+export function findWorkspaceRoot(startDir: string): string | null {\n+  let cursor = path.resolve(startDir);\n+\n+  while (true) {\n+    const candidate = path.join(cursor, \"pnpm-workspace.yaml\");\n+    if (existsSync(candidate)) {\n+      return cursor;\n+    }\n+\n+    const parent = path.dirname(cursor);\n+    if (parent === cursor) {\n+      return null;\n+    }\n+\n+    cursor = parent;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+export async function writeDashboardSnapshotFile(filePath: string, snapshot: DashboardSnapshot): Promise<void> {\n+  await writeTextFile(filePath, `${JSON.stringify(snapshot, null, 2)}\\n`);\n+}\n",

});\n+\n+  while (true) {\n+    const answer = (await rl.question(\"> \")).trim();\n+    const byIndex = Number(answer);\n+    if (Number.isInteger(byIndex) && byIndex >= 1 && byIndex <= options.length) {\n+      rl.close();\n+      return options[byIndex - 1]!.value;\n+    }\n+\n+    const byValue = options.find((option) => option.value === answer);\n+    if (byValue) {\n+      rl.close();\n+      return byValue.value;\n+    }\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function printHelp(): void {\n+  output.write(\n+    [\n+      \"Usage: pgg <command> [options]\",\n+      \"\",\n+      \"Commands:\",\n+      \"  pgg init [--cwd <dir>] [--provider codex] [--lang ko|en] [--auto on|off]\",\n+      \"  pgg update [--cwd <dir>]\",\n+      \"  pgg lang [--cwd <dir>] [--value ko|en]\",\n+ path.resolve(raw);\n+}\n+\n+function formatSyncResult(result: {\n+  created: string[];\n+  updated: string[];\n+  unchanged: string[];\n+  conflicts: Array<{ path: string; backupPath: string }>;\n+}): => ({\n+  selectedProjectId: null,\n+  selectedTopicKey: null,\n+  topicFilter: \"\",\n+  setSelectedProjectId: (value) => set({ selectedProjectId: value }),\n+  setSelectedTopicKey: (value) => set({ archive: \"archive\",\n+    language: \"language\",\n+    autoMode: \"auto mode\",\n+    provider: \"provider\",\n+    version: \"version\",\n+    health: \"health\",\n+    path: \"path\",\n+    missing: \"missing root\",\n+    partial: \"partial\",\n+    ok: \"ok\",\n+    noWorkflow: \"선택한 topic의 workflow 데이터가 없습니다.\",\n+    noTopics: \"필터 조건에 맞는 topic이 없습니다.\",\n+    searchPlaceholder:  workflow: \"Workflow\",\n+    settings: \"Settings\",\n+    registered: \"registered\",\n+    current: \"current\",\n+    active: \"active\",\n+    archive: \"archive\",\n+    language: \"language\",\n+    autoMode: \"auto mode\",\n+    provider: \"provider\",\n+    version: \"version\",\n+    health: \"health\",\n+    path: \"path\",\n+    missing: \"missing root\",\n+    partial: \"project files\",\n+    yes: \"yes\",\n+    no: \"no\"\n+  }\n+} as const;\n+\n+function App() {\n+  const selectedProjectId = useDashboardStore((state) => state.selectedProjectId);\n+  const =\n+    snapshot?.projects.find((project) => project.id === snapshot.currentProjectId) ??\n+    snapshot?.projects[0] ??\n+    null;\n+  const selectedProject =\n+    snapshot?.projects.find((project) => project.id === selectedProjectId) ?? fallbackProject;\n+  const dictionary = copy[selectedProject?.language ?? \"en\"];\n+\n+  useEffect(() => {\n+    if (!snapshot?.projects.length) {\n+      return;\n+    }\n+\n+    if (!selectedProjectId) {\n+      const nextProjectId = snapshot.currentProjectId ?? snapshot.projects[0]?.id ?? null;\n+      startTransition(() => {\n+        setSelectedProjectId(nextProjectId);\n+      });\n+    }\n+  }, [selectedProjectId, setSelectedProjectId, snapshot]);\n+\n+  const allTopics = selectedProject\n+    ? \" selected\" : \"\"}`}\n+                  onClick={() => {\n+                    startTransition(() => {\n+                      setSelectedProjectId(project.id);\n+                      setSelectedTopicKey(null);\n+                    });\n+                  }}\n+                  type=\"button\"\n+                >\n+                  <span className=\"project-chip\">{project.registered ? dictionary.registered : dictionary.current}</span>\n+                  <strong>{project.name}</strong>\n+                  <span>{project.rootDir}</span>\n+                  <div className=\"project-flags\">\n+                    <span>{project.language}</span>\n+                    <span>{project.autoMode}</span>\n+                    <span>{project.provider}</span>\n+                  </div>\n+                </button>\n+              );\n+            })}\n+          </div>\n+        </aside>\n+\n+        <section className=\"main-grid\">\n+          <article className=\"panel overview-panel\">\n+            <div className=\"panel-header\">\n+              <h2>{dictionary.overview}</h2>\n+            </div>\n+            {selectedProject ? (\n+              <div className=\"overview-grid\">\n+                <div className=\"metric-card accent\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.active}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.activeTopics.length}</strong>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"metric-card\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.archive}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.archivedTopics.length}</strong>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"metric-card\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.health}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.missingRoot ? dictionary.missing : dictionary.ok}</strong>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"detail-card\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.path}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.rootDir}</strong>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"detail-card\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.provider}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.provider}</strong>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"detail-card\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.version}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.installedVersion ?? \"n/a\"}</strong>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"detail-card\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.files}</span>\n+                  <strong>\n+                    AGENTS {selectedProject.hasAgents ? dictionary.yes : dictionary.no} / .codex{\" \"}\n+                    {selectedProject.hasCodex ? dictionary.yes : dictionary.no} / poggn{\" \"}\n+                    {selectedProject.hasPoggn ? dictionary.yes : dictionary.no}\n+                  </strong>\n+                </div>\n+              </div>\n+            ) : null}\n+          </article>\n+\n+          <article className=\"panel topics-panel\">\n+            <div className=\"panel-header\">\n+              <h2>{dictionary.topics}</h2>\n+              <input\n+                className=\"topic-search\"\n+                onChange={(event) => setTopicFilter(event.target.value)}\n+                placeholder={dictionary.searchPlaceholder}\n+                value={topicFilter}\n+              />\n+            </div>\n+            <div className=\"topic-list\">\n+              {visibleTopics.length === 0 ? (\n+                <div className=\"empty-hint\">{dictionary.noTopics}</div>\n+              ) : (\n+                visibleTopics.map((topic) => {\n+                  const key = `${topic.bucket}:${topic.name}`;\n+                  const selected = key === selectedTopicKey;\n+                  return (\n+                    <button\n+                      key={key}\n+                      className={`topic-card${selected ? \" selected\" : \"\"}`}\n+                      onClick={() => {\n+                        startTransition(() => {\n+                          setSelectedTopicKey(key);\n+                        });\n+                      }}\n+                      type=\"button\"\n+                    >\n+                      <div className=\"topic-card-top\">\n+                        <strong>{topic.name}</strong>\n+                        <span className={`badge ${topic.bucket}`}>{topic.bucket}</span>\n+                      </div>\n+                      <span>{topic.stage ?? \"-\"}</span>\n+                      <p>{topic.goal ?? \"-\"}</p>\n+                      <div className=\"topic-meta\">\n+                        <span>\n+                          {dictionary.topicScore}: {topic.score ?? \"-\"}\n+                        </span>\n+                        <span>{topic.health === \"ok\" ? dictionary.ok : dictionary.partial}</span>\n+                      </div>\n+                    </button>\n+                  );\n+                })\n+              )}\n+            </div>\n+          </article>\n+\n+          <article className=\"panel workflow-panel\">\n+            <div className=\"panel-header\">\n+              <h2>{dictionary.workflow}</h2>\n+            </div>\n+            {selectedTopic?.workflow ? b/packages/core/src/readme.ts\n@@ -0,0 +1,142 @@\n+import { writeFile } from \"node:fs/promises\";\n+import path from \"node:path\";\n+\n+function lines(parts: string[]): string {\n+  return `${parts.join(\"\\n\")}\\n`;\n+}\n+\n+export function buildRootReadme(): string {\n+  return lines([\n+    \"# pgg\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"pgg is a pnpm-based workspace that turns the `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, and `poggn` workflow into a reusable CLI and dashboard product.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"pgg는 `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `poggn` 워크플로를 재사용 가능한 CLI와 dashboard 제품으로 정리한 pnpm workspace입니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Quick Start\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"이 저장소에서 바로 동작을 확인하려면 아래 순서로 진행합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"```bash\",\n+    \"pnpm install\",\n+    \"pnpm build\",\n+    \"node packages/cli/dist/index.js init --cwd /tmp/pgg-sample --provider codex --lang ko --auto on\",\n+    \"node packages/cli/dist/index.js dashboard --cwd /tmp/pgg-sample --snapshot-only\",\n+    \"```\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"현재 저장소 기준 예시는 모두 local workspace 실행 경로인 `node packages/cli/dist/index.js ...`를 사용합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"`@pgg/cli` package 기준 global link와 설치 문서는 `packages/cli/README.md`를 참고합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"To try the repository locally, run the workspace build first and then execute the CLI from `packages/cli/dist`.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"All examples in this repository use the local workspace entrypoint: `node packages/cli/dist/index.js ...`.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"For package-level install and global link usage, see `packages/cli/README.md`.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Commands\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `pgg init`: 대상 프로젝트에 `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, manifest를 생성하고 registry에 등록합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg update`: generator 관리 자산을 현재 버전에 맞게 다시 동기화합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg lang`: `ko`, `en` 전환과 관련 generated asset 반영을 수행합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg auto`: `on`, `off` 전환과 auto mode 관련 문서 상태를 반영합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg dashboard`: snapshot export 또는 로컬 dashboard 실행을 수행합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `pgg init`: creates `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, and the local manifest for a target project.\",\n+    \"- `pgg update`: resynchronizes generator-managed assets to the current product shape.\",\n+    \"- `pgg lang`: switches between `ko` and `en` and updates generated assets.\",\n+    \"- `pgg auto`: switches workflow auto mode between `on` and `off`.\",\n+    \"- `pgg dashboard`: exports a snapshot or launches the local operations dashboard.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Workflow\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"`pgg`는 topic을 `poggn/active/<topic>` 아래에서 관리하고 다음 순서로 진행합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"1. `pgg-add`: proposal 생성\",\n+    \"2. `pgg-plan`: plan, task, spec 생성\",\n+    \"3. `pgg-code`: 구현과 diff 기록\",\n+    \"4. `pgg-qa`: 테스트, 리뷰, archive 판정\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"검증이 끝난 topic만 `poggn/archive/<topic>`으로 이동합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"Topics live under `poggn/active/<topic>` and move through proposal, planning, implementation, and QA before archive.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"Only QA-passed topics move to `poggn/archive/<topic>`.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Project Structure\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `.codex/`: workflow 규칙, skill, shell helper\",\n+    \"- `poggn/`: active/archive topic 문서와 상태 기록\",\n+    \"- `AGENTS.md`: Codex 작업 규칙\",\n+    \"- `packages/core`: generator, manifest, registry, analyzer\",\n+    \"- `packages/cli`: `pgg` CLI 엔트리\",\n+    \"- `apps/dashboard`: React, React Query, React Flow, Zustand 기반 운영 UI\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `.codex/`: workflow rules, skills, and shell helpers\",\n+    \"- `poggn/`: active and archived topic records\",\n+    \"- `AGENTS.md`: Codex-specific working rules\",\n+    \"- `packages/core`: generators, manifest IO, registry helpers, analyzers\",\n+    \"- `packages/cli`: the `pgg` CLI entrypoint\",\n+    \"- `apps/dashboard`: the local React operations dashboard\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Dashboard\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"dashboard는 현재 프로젝트와 registry snapshot을 읽어 topic 상태, workflow, 언어, auto mode, dashboard 기본 포트를 보여줍니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"로컬 개발에서는 아래 스크립트를 사용할 수 있습니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"```bash\",\n+    \"pnpm dev:dashboard\",\n+    \"```\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"또는 CLI를 통해 snapshot 생성과 함께 실행할 수 있습니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"```bash\",\n+    \"node packages/cli/dist/index.js dashboard --cwd /path/to/project --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173\",\n+    \"```\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"The dashboard reads the current project and registry snapshot to show topic health, workflow state, language, auto mode, and the saved dashboard port.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"Use `pnpm dev:dashboard` for local UI work, or run the CLI dashboard +                    "content": "diff --git a/README.md b/README.md\nindex 2856941..989a514 100644\n--- a/README.md\n+++ b/README.md\n@@ -1,5 +1,125 @@\n-# ygg\n+# pgg\n \n-`ygg` is a workflow tool for Claude Code and Codex projects. It scaffolds agent-specific files and manages change-driven development through `ygg/change/` with the staged flow `create → next → add → qa`.\n+pgg is a pnpm-based workspace that turns the `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, and `poggn` workflow into a reusable CLI and dashboard product.\n \n-The current product surface is centered on workflow management, verification, archive handling, dashboard support, and optional local LLM assistance. Legacy spec-first generation commands are not part of the active workflow.\n+pgg는 `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `poggn` 워크플로를 재사용 가능한 CLI와 dashboard 제품으로 정리한 pnpm workspace입니다.\n+\n+## Quick Start\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+이 저장소에서 바로 동작을 확인하려면 아래 순서로 진행합니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+pnpm install\n+pnpm build\n+node packages/cli/dist/index.js init --cwd /tmp/pgg-sample --provider codex --lang ko --auto on\n+node packages/cli/dist/index.js dashboard --cwd /tmp/pgg-sample --snapshot-only\n+```\n+\n+현재 저장소 기준 예시는 모두 local workspace 실행 경로인 `node packages/cli/dist/index.js ...`를 사용합니다.\n+\n+`@pgg/cli` package 기준 global link와 설치 문서는 `packages/cli/README.md`를 참고합니다.\n+\n+### en\n+\n+To try the repository locally, run the workspace build first and then execute the CLI from `packages/cli/dist`.\n+\n+All examples in this repository use the local workspace entrypoint: `node packages/cli/dist/index.js ...`.\n+\n+For package-level install and global link usage, see `packages/cli/README.md`.\n+\n+## Commands\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+- `pgg init`: 대상 프로젝트에 `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, manifest를 생성하고 registry에 등록합니다.\n+- `pgg update`: generator 관리 자산을 현재 버전에 맞게 다시 동기화합니다.\n+- `pgg lang`: `ko`, `en` 전환과 관련 generated asset 반영을 수행합니다.\n+- `pgg auto`: `on`, `off` 전환과 auto mode 관련 문서 상태를 반영합니다.\n+- `pgg dashboard`: snapshot export 또는 로컬 dashboard 실행을 수행합니다.\n+\n+### en\n+\n+- `pgg init`: creates `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, and the local manifest for a target project.\n+- `pgg update`: resynchronizes generator-managed assets to the current product shape.\n+- `pgg lang`: switches between `ko` and `en` and updates generated assets.\n+- `pgg auto`: switches workflow auto mode between `on` and `off`.\n+- `pgg dashboard`: exports a snapshot or launches the local operations dashboard.\n+\n+## Workflow\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+`pgg`는 topic을 `poggn/active/<topic>` 아래에서 관리하고 다음 순서로 진행합니다.\n+\n+1. `pgg-add`: proposal 생성\n+2. `pgg-plan`: plan, task, spec 생성\n+3. `pgg-code`: 구현과 diff 기록\n+4. `pgg-qa`: 테스트, 리뷰, archive 판정\n+\n+검증이 끝난 topic만 `poggn/archive/<topic>`으로 이동합니다.\n+\n+### en\n+\n+Topics live under `poggn/active/<topic>` and move through proposal, planning, implementation, and QA before archive.\n+\n+Only QA-passed topics move to `poggn/archive/<topic>`.\n+\n+## Project Structure\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+- `.codex/`: workflow 규칙, skill, shell helper\n+- `poggn/`: active/archive topic 문서와 상태 기록\n+- `AGENTS.md`: Codex 작업 규칙\n+- `packages/core`: generator, manifest, registry, analyzer\n+- `packages/cli`: `pgg` CLI 엔트리\n+- `apps/dashboard`: React, React Query, React Flow, Zustand 기반 운영 UI\n+\n+### en\n+\n+- `.codex/`: workflow rules, skills, and shell helpers\n+- `poggn/`: active and archived topic records\n+- `AGENTS.md`: Codex-specific working rules\n+- `packages/core`: generators, manifest IO, registry helpers, analyzers\n+- `packages/cli`: the `pgg` CLI entrypoint\n+- `apps/dashboard`: the local React operations dashboard\n+\n+## Dashboard\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+dashboard는 현재 프로젝트와 registry snapshot을 읽어 topic 상태, workflow, 언어, auto mode, dashboard 기본 포트를 보여줍니다.\n+\n+로컬 개발에서는 아래 스크립트를 사용할 수 있습니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+pnpm dev:dashboard\n+```\n+\n+또는 CLI를 통해 snapshot 생성과 함께 실행할 수 있습니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+node packages/cli/dist/index.js dashboard --cwd /path/to/project --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173\n+```\n+\n+### en\n+\n+The dashboard reads the current project and registry snapshot to show topic health, workflow state, language, auto mode, and the saved dashboard port.\n+\n+Use `pnpm dev:dashboard` for local UI work, or run the CLI dashboard command to generate and serve project data.\n+\n+## Notes\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+- 현재 provider 구현 범위는 `codex`입니다.\n+- `README.md`는 generator가 관리하는 문서 자산입니다.\n+- project-level README 생성과 `pgg update` 직접 연동은 후속 범위입니다.\n+\n+### en\n+\n+- The current provider implementation is limited to `codex`.\n+- This `README.md` is intended to be a generator-managed document asset.\n+- Project-level README generation and direct `pgg update` wiring remain future work.\n",

+                    "content": "diff --git a/packages/cli/README.md b/packages/cli/README.md\nnew file mode 100644\nindex 0000000..5e2dbfc\n--- /dev/null\n+++ b/packages/cli/README.md\n@@ -0,0 +1,44 @@\n+# `@pgg/cli`\n+\n+`@pgg/cli` is the publishable package surface for the `pgg` command.\n+\n+`@pgg/cli`는 `pgg` 명령을 배포하는 package 표면입니다.\n+\n+## Local Workspace Build\n+\n+루트 workspace에서 먼저 CLI를 빌드합니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+pnpm install\n+pnpm --filter @pgg/cli build\n+```\n+\n+## Global Link\n+\n+workspace 루트에서 아래 명령으로 CLI package만 global link 합니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+pnpm --filter @pgg/cli link --global\n+pgg --help\n+```\n+\n+또는 `packages/cli` 디렉터리에서 직접 실행할 수 있습니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+cd packages/cli\n+pnpm link --global\n+pgg --help\n+```\n+\n+## Local Run Without Linking\n+\n+global link 없이 현재 저장소에서 직접 실행하려면 root README와 같이 local workspace entrypoint를 사용합니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+node packages/cli/dist/index.js init --cwd /tmp/pgg-sample --provider codex --lang ko --auto on\n+```\n+\n+## Notes\n+\n+- root `README.md`는 workspace 개발 문서입니다.\n+- package install, publish, global link 표면은 이 문서를 기준으로 유지합니다.\n",

`${parts.join(\"\\n\")}\\n`;\n+}\n+\n+export function buildRootReadme(): string {\n+  return lines([\n+    \"# pgg\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"pgg is a pnpm-based workspace that turns the `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, and `poggn` workflow into a reusable CLI and dashboard product.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"pgg는 `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `poggn` 워크플로를 재사용 가능한 CLI와 dashboard 제품으로 정리한 pnpm workspace입니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Quick Start\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"이 저장소에서 바로 동작을 확인하려면 아래 순서로 진행합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"```bash\",\n+    \"pnpm install\",\n+    \"pnpm build\",\n+    \"node packages/cli/dist/index.js init --cwd /tmp/pgg-sample --provider codex --lang ko --auto on\",\n+    \"node packages/cli/dist/index.js dashboard --cwd /tmp/pgg-sample --snapshot-only\",\n+    \"```\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"설치형 CLI로 사용할 때는 같은 명령을 `pgg init`, `pgg update`, `pgg lang`, `pgg auto`, `pgg dashboard` 형태로 실행할 수 있습니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"To try the repository locally, run the workspace build first and then execute the CLI from `packages/cli/dist`.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"When the package is installed as a CLI, the same flows are available through `pgg init`, `pgg update`, `pgg lang`, `pgg auto`, and `pgg dashboard`.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Commands\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `pgg init`: 대상 프로젝트에 `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, manifest를 생성하고 registry에 등록합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg update`: generator 관리 자산을 현재 버전에 맞게 다시 동기화합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg lang`: `ko`, `en` 전환과 관련 generated asset 반영을 수행합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg auto`: `on`, `off` 전환과 auto mode 관련 문서 상태를 반영합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg dashboard`: snapshot export 또는 로컬 dashboard 실행을 수행합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `pgg init`: creates `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, and the local manifest for a target project.\",\n+    \"- `pgg update`: resynchronizes generator-managed assets to the current product shape.\",\n+    \"- `pgg lang`: switches between `ko` and `en` and updates generated assets.\",\n+    \"- `pgg auto`: switches workflow auto mode between `on` and `off`.\",\n+    \"- `pgg dashboard`: exports a snapshot or launches the local operations dashboard.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Workflow\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"`pgg`는 topic을 `poggn/active/<topic>` 아래에서 관리하고 다음 순서로 진행합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"1. `pgg-add`: proposal 생성\",\n+    \"2. `pgg-plan`: plan, task, spec 생성\",\n+    \"3. `pgg-code`: 구현과 diff 기록\",\n+    \"4. `pgg-qa`: 테스트, 리뷰, archive 판정\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"검증이 끝난 topic만 `poggn/archive/<topic>`으로 이동합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"Topics live under `poggn/active/<topic>` and move through proposal, planning, implementation, and QA before archive.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"Only QA-passed topics move to `poggn/archive/<topic>`.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Project Structure\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `.codex/`: workflow 규칙, skill, shell helper\",\n+    \"- `poggn/`: active/archive topic 문서와 상태 기록\",\n+    \"- `AGENTS.md`: Codex 작업 규칙\",\n+    \"- `packages/core`: generator, manifest, registry, analyzer\",\n+    \"- `packages/cli`: `pgg` CLI 엔트리\",\n+    \"- `apps/dashboard`: React, React Query, React Flow, Zustand 기반 운영 UI\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `.codex/`: workflow rules, skills, and shell helpers\",\n+    \"- `poggn/`: active and archived topic records\",\n+    \"- `AGENTS.md`: Codex-specific working rules\",\n+    \"- `packages/core`: generators, manifest IO, registry helpers, analyzers\",\n+    \"- `packages/cli`: the `pgg` CLI entrypoint\",\n+    \"- `apps/dashboard`: the local React operations dashboard\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Dashboard\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"dashboard는 현재 프로젝트와 registry snapshot을 읽어 topic 상태, workflow, 언어, auto mode, dashboard 기본 포트를 보여줍니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"로컬 개발에서는 아래 스크립트를 사용할 수 있습니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"```bash\",\n+    \"pnpm dev:dashboard\",\n+    \"```\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"또는 CLI를 통해 snapshot 생성과 함께 실행할 수 있습니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"```bash\",\n+    \"node packages/cli/dist/index.js dashboard --cwd /path/to/project --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173\",\n+    \"```\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"The dashboard reads the current project and registry snapshot to show topic health, workflow state, language, auto mode, and the saved dashboard port.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"Use `pnpm dev:dashboard` for local UI work, or run the CLI dashboard command to generate and serve project data.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Notes\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- 현재 provider 구현 범위는 `codex`입니다.\",\n+    \"- `README.md`는 generator가 관리하는 문서 자산입니다.\",\n+    \"- project-level README 생성과 `pgg update` 직접 연동은 후속 범위입니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- The current provider implementation is limited to `codex`.\",\n+    \"- This `README.md` is intended to be a generator-managed document asset.\",\n+    \"- Project-level README generation and direct `pgg update` wiring remain future work.\"\n+  ]);\n+}\n+\n+export async function writeRootReadme(rootDir: string): Promise<string> {\n+  const target = path.join(rootDir, \"README.md\");\n+  await writeFile(target, buildRootReadme(), \"utf8\");\n+  return target;\n+}\n",

dashboard` 형태로 실행할 수 있습니다.\n+\n+### en\n+\n+To try the repository locally, run the workspace build first and then execute the CLI from `packages/cli/dist`.\n+\n+When the package is installed as a CLI, the same flows are available through `pgg init`, `pgg update`, `pgg lang`, `pgg auto`, and `pgg dashboard`.\n+\n+## Commands\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+- `pgg init`: 대상 프로젝트에 `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, manifest를 생성하고 registry에 등록합니다.\n+- `pgg update`: generator 관리 자산을 현재 버전에 맞게 다시 동기화합니다.\n+- `pgg lang`: `ko`, `en` 전환과 관련 generated asset 반영을 수행합니다.\n+- `pgg auto`: `on`, `off` 전환과 auto mode 관련 문서 상태를 반영합니다.\n+- `pgg dashboard`: snapshot export 또는 로컬 dashboard 실행을 수행합니다.\n+\n+### en\n+\n+- `pgg init`: creates `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, and the local manifest for a target project.\n+- `pgg update`: resynchronizes generator-managed assets to the current product shape.\n+- `pgg lang`: switches between `ko` and `en` and updates generated assets.\n+- `pgg auto`: switches workflow auto mode between `on` and `off`.\n+- `pgg dashboard`: exports a snapshot or launches the local operations dashboard.\n+\n+## Workflow\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+`pgg`는 topic을 `poggn/active/<topic>` 아래에서 관리하고 다음 순서로 진행합니다.\n+\n+1. `pgg-add`: proposal 생성\n+2. `pgg-plan`: plan, task, spec 생성\n+3. `pgg-code`: 구현과 diff 기록\n+4. `pgg-qa`: 테스트, 리뷰, archive 판정\n+\n+검증이 끝난 topic만 `poggn/archive/<topic>`으로 이동합니다.\n+\n+### en\n+\n+Topics live under `poggn/active/<topic>` and move through proposal, planning, implementation, and QA before archive.\n+\n+Only QA-passed topics move to `poggn/archive/<topic>`.\n+\n+## Project Structure\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+- `.codex/`: workflow 규칙, skill, shell helper\n+- `poggn/`: active/archive topic 문서와 상태 기록\n+- `AGENTS.md`: Codex 작업 규칙\n+- `packages/core`: generator, manifest, registry, analyzer\n+- `packages/cli`: `pgg` CLI 엔트리\n+- `apps/dashboard`: React, React Query, React Flow, Zustand 기반 운영 UI\n+\n+### en\n+\n+- `.codex/`: workflow rules, skills, and shell helpers\n+- `poggn/`: active and archived topic records\n+- `AGENTS.md`: Codex-specific working rules\n+- `packages/core`: generators, manifest IO, registry helpers, analyzers\n+- `packages/cli`: the `pgg` CLI entrypoint\n+- `apps/dashboard`: the local React operations dashboard\n+\n+## Dashboard\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+dashboard는 현재 프로젝트와 registry snapshot을 읽어 topic 상태, workflow, 언어, auto mode, dashboard 기본 포트를 보여줍니다.\n+\n+로컬 개발에서는 아래 스크립트를 사용할 수 있습니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+pnpm dev:dashboard\n+```\n+\n+또는 CLI를 통해 snapshot 생성과 함께 실행할 수 있습니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+node packages/cli/dist/index.js dashboard --cwd /path/to/project --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173\n+```\n+\n+### en\n+\n+The dashboard reads the current project and registry snapshot to show topic health, workflow state, language, auto mode, and the saved dashboard port.\n+\n+Use `pnpm dev:dashboard` for local UI work, or run the CLI dashboard command to generate and serve project data.\n+\n+## Notes\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+- 현재 provider 구현 범위는 `codex`입니다.\n+- `README.md`는 generator가 관리하는 문서 자산입니다.\n+- project-level README 생성과 `pgg update` 직접 연동은 후속 범위입니다.\n+\n+### en\n+\n+- The current provider implementation is limited to `codex`.\n+- This `README.md` is intended to be a generator-managed document asset.\n+- Project-level README generation and direct `pgg update` wiring remain future work.\n",

기록\n+- `AGENTS.md`: Codex 작업 규칙\n+- `packages/core`: generator, manifest, registry, analyzer\n+- `packages/cli`: `pgg` CLI 엔트리\n+- `apps/dashboard`: React, React Query, React Flow, Zustand 기반 운영 ko\n+\n+dashboard는 현재 프로젝트와 registry snapshot을 읽어 topic 상태, workflow, 언어, auto mode, dashboard 기본 포트를 보여줍니다.\n+\n+로컬 개발에서는 아래 스크립트를 사용할 수 있습니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+pnpm dev:dashboard\n+```\n+\n+또는 CLI를 통해 +                    "content": "diff --git a/packages/cli/README.md b/packages/cli/README.md\nnew file mode 100644\nindex 0000000..20efed1\n--- /dev/null\n+++ b/packages/cli/README.md\n@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@\n+# `@pgg/cli`\n+\n+`@pgg/cli` contains the CLI implementation that the repo root exposes as the `pgg` command.\n+\n+`@pgg/cli`는 repo root가 `pgg` 명령으로 노출하는 CLI 구현 package입니다.\n+\n+## Recommended Root Flow\n+\n+일반적인 로컬 사용은 repo root에서 아래 순서로 진행합니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+pnpm install\n+pnpm build\n+pnpm link --global\n+pgg --help\n+```\n+\n+## Direct Package Link\n+\n+package 자체를 직접 다루고 싶다면 아래처럼 `packages/cli`에서 link할 수 있습니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+cd packages/cli\n+pnpm build\n+pnpm link --global\n+pgg --help\n+```\n+\n+## Local Run Without Linking\n+\n+global link 없이 현재 저장소에서 직접 실행하려면 root README와 같이 local workspace entrypoint를 사용합니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+node packages/cli/dist/index.js init --cwd /tmp/pgg-sample --provider codex --lang ko --auto on\n+```\n+\n+## Notes\n+\n+- root `README.md`가 우선 onboarding 문서입니다.\n+- 이 문서는 CLI 구현 package 관점의 보조 설명으로 유지합니다.\n",

+import { createHash } from "node:crypto";
+import { existsSync } from "node:fs";
+import { chmod, mkdir, readFile, readdir, stat, writeFile } from "node:fs/promises";
+import os from "node:os";
+import path from "node:path";
+import { buildGeneratedFiles, type TemplateAutoMode, type TemplateInput, type TemplateLanguage, type TemplateProvider } from "./templates.js";
+
+export const PGG_VERSION = "0.1.0";
+export const MANIFEST_RELATIVE_PATH = ".pgg/project.json";
+export const REGISTRY_RELATIVE_PATH = ".pgg/registry.json";
+
+export type PggLanguage = TemplateLanguage;
+export type PggAutoMode = TemplateAutoMode;
+export type PggProvider = TemplateProvider;
+
+export interface ManagedFileRecord {
+  path: string;
+  checksum: string;
+  executable: boolean;
+}
+
+export interface ProjectManifest {
+  schemaVersion: number;
+  projectName: string;
+  rootDir: string;
+  provider: PggProvider;
+  language: PggLanguage;
+  autoMode: PggAutoMode;
+  installedVersion: string;
+  updatedAt: string;
+  dashboard: {
+    defaultPort: number;
+  };
+  managedFiles: ManagedFileRecord[];
+}
+
+export interface RegistryProjectEntry {
+  id: string;
+  name: string;
+  rootDir: string;
+  provider: PggProvider;
+  language: PggLanguage;
+  autoMode: PggAutoMode;
+  lastOpenedAt: string;
+}
+
+export interface GlobalRegistry {
+  version: number;
+  projects: RegistryProjectEntry[];
+}
+
+export interface SyncConflict {
+  path: string;
+  backupPath: string;
+}
+
+export interface SyncResult {
+  manifest: ProjectManifest;
+  created: string[];
+  updated: string[];
+  unchanged: string[];
+  conflicts: SyncConflict[];
+}
+
+export interface TopicSummary {
+  name: string;
+  bucket: "active" | "archive";
+  stage: string | null;
+  goal: string | null;
+  nextAction: string | null;
+  score: number | null;
+  blockingIssues: string | null;
+  status: string | null;
+  workflow: WorkflowDocument | null;
+  health: "ok" | "partial";
+}
+
+export interface WorkflowNodeData {
+  label?: string;
+  path?: string;
+  stage?: string;
+  crud?: string;
+  diffRef?: string;
+}
+
+export interface WorkflowNode {
+  id: string;
+  type: string;
+  position: {
+    x: number;
+    y: number;
+  };
+  data: WorkflowNodeData;
+}
+
+export interface WorkflowEdge {
+  id: string;
+  source: string;
+  target: string;
+}
+
+export interface WorkflowDocument {
+  topic: string;
+  nodes: WorkflowNode[];
+  edges: WorkflowEdge[];
+}
+
+export interface ProjectSnapshot {
+  id: string;
+  name: string;
+  rootDir: string;
+  registered: boolean;
+  missingRoot: boolean;
+  provider: PggProvider;
+  language: PggLanguage;
+  autoMode: PggAutoMode;
+  installedVersion: string | null;
+  hasAgents: boolean;
+  hasCodex: boolean;
+  hasPoggn: boolean;
+  activeTopics: TopicSummary[];
+  archivedTopics: TopicSummary[];
+}
+
+export interface DashboardSnapshot {
+  generatedAt: string;
+  currentProjectId: string | null;
+  projects: ProjectSnapshot[];
+}
+
+export interface InitOptions {
+  provider?: PggProvider;
+  language?: PggLanguage;
+  autoMode?: PggAutoMode;
+}
+
+function checksum(value: string): string {
+  return createHash("sha256").update(value).digest("hex");
+}
+
+function nowIso(): string {
+  return new Date().toISOString();
+}
+
+function stableProjectId(rootDir: string): string {
+  const base = path.basename(rootDir).toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-") || "project";
+  return `${base}-${checksum(rootDir).slice(0, 8)}`;
+}
+
+function sanitizeFileName(value: string): string {
+  return value.replace(/[\\/.: ]+/g, "_");
+}
+
+async function ensureParentDir(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
+  await mkdir(path.dirname(filePath), { recursive: true });
+}
+
+async function readTextIfExists(filePath: string): Promise<string | null> {
+  try {
+    return await readFile(filePath, "utf8");
+  } catch {
+    return null;
+  }
+}
+
+async function writeTextFile(filePath: string, content: string): Promise<void> {
+  await ensureParentDir(filePath);
+  await writeFile(filePath, content, "utf8");
+}
+
+function manifestPath(rootDir: string): string {
+  return path.join(rootDir, MANIFEST_RELATIVE_PATH);
+}
+
+function registryPath(): string {
+  return path.join(os.homedir(), REGISTRY_RELATIVE_PATH);
+}
+
+function buildTemplateInput(manifest: ProjectManifest): TemplateInput {
+  return {
+    language: manifest.language,
+    autoMode: manifest.autoMode,
+    provider: manifest.provider,
+    version: manifest.installedVersion
+  };
+}
+
+export function createProjectManifest(rootDir: string, options: InitOptions = {}): ProjectManifest {
+  return {
+    schemaVersion: 1,
+    projectName: path.basename(rootDir),
+    rootDir,
+    provider: options.provider ?? "codex",
+    language: options.language ?? "ko",
+    autoMode: options.autoMode ?? "on",
+    installedVersion: PGG_VERSION,
+    updatedAt: nowIso(),
+    dashboard: {
+      defaultPort: 4173
+    },
+    managedFiles: []
+  };
+}
+
+export async function loadProjectManifest(rootDir: string): Promise<ProjectManifest | null> {
+  const raw = await readTextIfExists(manifestPath(rootDir));
+  if (!raw) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  return JSON.parse(raw) as ProjectManifest;
+}
+
+export async function saveProjectManifest(rootDir: string, manifest: ProjectManifest): Promise<void> {
+  const target = manifestPath(rootDir);
+  await writeTextFile(target, `${JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2)}\n`);
+}
+
+export async function loadGlobalRegistry(): Promise<GlobalRegistry> {
+  const raw = await readTextIfExists(registryPath());
+  if (!raw) {
+    return {
+      version: 1,
+      projects: []
+    };
+  }
+
+  return JSON.parse(raw) as GlobalRegistry;
+}
+
+export async function saveGlobalRegistry(registry: GlobalRegistry): Promise<void> {
+  const target = registryPath();
+  await writeTextFile(target, `${JSON.stringify(registry, null, 2)}\n`);
+}
+
+export async function syncProject(rootDir: string, manifest: ProjectManifest): Promise<SyncResult> {
+  const priorManaged = new Map(manifest.managedFiles.map((entry) => [entry.path, entry]));
+  const templates = buildGeneratedFiles(buildTemplateInput(manifest));
+  const created: string[] = [];
+  const updated: string[] = [];
+  const unchanged: string[] = [];
+  const conflicts: SyncConflict[] = [];
+  const nextManaged: ManagedFileRecord[] = [];
+  const timestamp = nowIso();
+
+  for (const template of templates) {
+    const target = path.join(rootDir, template.path);
+    const current = await readTextIfExists(target);
+    const nextChecksum = checksum(template.content);
+    const previousManaged = priorManaged.get(template.path);
+
+    if (
+      current !== null &&
+      previousManaged &&
+      checksum(current) !== previousManaged.checksum &&
+      current !== template.content
+    ) {
+      const backupPath = path.join(
+        rootDir,
+        ".pgg",
+        "backups",
+        `${timestamp.replaceAll(":", "-")}-${sanitizeFileName(template.path)}`
+      );
+      await writeTextFile(backupPath, current);
+      conflicts.push({
+        path: template.path,
+        backupPath: path.relative(rootDir, backupPath)
+      });
+    }
+
+    if (current === null) {
+      await writeTextFile(target, template.content);
+      created.push(template.path);
+    } else if (current !== template.content) {
+      await writeTextFile(target, template.content);
+      updated.push(template.path);
+    } else {
+      unchanged.push(template.path);
+    }
+
+    if (template.executable) {
+      await chmod(target, 0o755);
+    }
+
+    nextManaged.push({
+      path: template.path,
+      checksum: nextChecksum,
+      executable: template.executable ?? false
+    });
+  }
+
+  const nextManifest: ProjectManifest = {
+    ...manifest,
+    installedVersion: PGG_VERSION,
+    updatedAt: timestamp,
+    managedFiles: nextManaged
+  };
+
+  await saveProjectManifest(rootDir, nextManifest);
+
+  return {
+    manifest: nextManifest,
+    created,
+    updated,
+    unchanged,
+    conflicts
+  };
+}
+
+export async function registerProject(manifest: ProjectManifest): Promise<GlobalRegistry> {
+  const registry = await loadGlobalRegistry();
+  const nextEntry: RegistryProjectEntry = {
+    id: stableProjectId(manifest.rootDir),
+    name: manifest.projectName,
+    rootDir: manifest.rootDir,
+    provider: manifest.provider,
+    language: manifest.language,
+    autoMode: manifest.autoMode,
+    lastOpenedAt: nowIso()
+  };
+
+  const projects = registry.projects.filter((entry) => entry.rootDir !== manifest.rootDir);
+  projects.unshift(nextEntry);
+
+  const nextRegistry: GlobalRegistry = {
+    ...registry,
+    projects
+  };
+
+  await saveGlobalRegistry(nextRegistry);
+  return nextRegistry;
+}
+
+export async function initializeProject(rootDir: string, options: InitOptions = {}): Promise<SyncResult> {
+  const manifest = createProjectManifest(rootDir, options);
+  const syncResult = await syncProject(rootDir, manifest);
+  await registerProject(syncResult.manifest);
+  return syncResult;
+}
+
+async function requireManifest(rootDir: string): Promise<ProjectManifest> {
+  const manifest = await loadProjectManifest(rootDir);
+  if (!manifest) {
+    throw new Error("Project is not initialized. Run `pgg init` first.");
+  }
+
+  return manifest;
+}
+
+export async function updateProject(rootDir: string): Promise<SyncResult> {
+  const manifest = await requireManifest(rootDir);
+  const syncResult = await syncProject(rootDir, manifest);
+  await registerProject(syncResult.manifest);
+  return syncResult;
+}
+
+export async function updateProjectLanguage(rootDir: string, language: PggLanguage): Promise<SyncResult> {
+  const manifest = await requireManifest(rootDir);
+  const syncResult = await syncProject(rootDir, { ...manifest, language });
+  await registerProject(syncResult.manifest);
+  return syncResult;
+}
+
+export async function updateProjectAutoMode(rootDir: string, autoMode: PggAutoMode): Promise<SyncResult> {
+  const manifest = await requireManifest(rootDir);
+  const syncResult = await syncProject(rootDir, { ...manifest, autoMode });
+  await registerProject(syncResult.manifest);
+  return syncResult;
+}
+
+function parseMarkdownSection(markdown: string, title: string): string | null {
+  const escaped = title.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&");
+  const pattern = new RegExp(`## ${escaped}\\n\\n([\\s\\S]*?)(?=\\n## |$)`);
+  const match = markdown.match(pattern);
+  if (!match?.[1]) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  return match[1].trim();
+}
+
+function parseKeyValue(markdown: string, key: string): string | null {
+  const escaped = key.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&");
+  const pattern = new RegExp(`^[ \\t]*${escaped}:\\s*"?([^"\\n]+)"?`, "m");
+  const match = markdown.match(pattern);
+  return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? null;
+}
+
+function parseScore(markdown: string): number | null {
+  const section = parseMarkdownSection(markdown, "Last Expert Score");
+  if (!section) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  const match = section.match(/score:\s*([0-9]+)/);
+  return match ? Number(match[1]) : null;
+}
+
+function parseBlockingIssues(markdown: string): string | null {
+  const section = parseMarkdownSection(markdown, "Last Expert Score");
+  if (!section) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  const match = section.match(/blocking issues:\s*(.+)/);
+  return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? null;
+}
+
+async function readWorkflow(filePath: string): Promise<WorkflowDocument | null> {
+  const raw = await readTextIfExists(filePath);
+  if (!raw) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    return JSON.parse(raw) as WorkflowDocument;
+  } catch {
+    return null;
+  }
+}
+
+async function listTopicSummaries(rootDir: string, bucket: "active" | "archive"): Promise<TopicSummary[]> {
+  const bucketDir = path.join(rootDir, "poggn", bucket);
+  const entries = await readdir(bucketDir, { withFileTypes: true }).catch(() => []);
+  const topics = entries.filter((entry) => entry.isDirectory()).sort((left, right) => left.name.localeCompare(right.name));
+  const result: TopicSummary[] = [];
+
+  for (const entry of topics) {
+    const topicDir = path.join(bucketDir, entry.name);
+    const statePath = path.join(topicDir, "state", "current.md");
+    const proposalPath = path.join(topicDir, "proposal.md");
+    const stateMarkdown = await readTextIfExists(statePath);
+    const proposalMarkdown = await readTextIfExists(proposalPath);
+    const workflow = await readWorkflow(path.join(topicDir, "workflow.reactflow.json"));
+    const stage = stateMarkdown ? parseMarkdownSection(stateMarkdown, "Current Stage") : parseKeyValue(proposalMarkdown ?? "", "stage");
+    const goal = stateMarkdown ? parseMarkdownSection(stateMarkdown, "Goal") : null;
+    const nextAction = stateMarkdown ? parseMarkdownSection(stateMarkdown, "Next Action") : null;
+    const score = stateMarkdown ? parseScore(stateMarkdown) : null;
+    const blockingIssues = stateMarkdown ? parseBlockingIssues(stateMarkdown) : null;
+    const status = proposalMarkdown ? parseKeyValue(proposalMarkdown, "status") : null;
+
+    result.push({
+      name: entry.name,
+      bucket,
+      stage,
+      goal,
+      nextAction,
+      score,
+      blockingIssues,
+      status,
+      workflow,
+      health: stateMarkdown && workflow ? "ok" : "partial"
+    });
+  }
+
+  return result;
+}
+
+export async function analyzeProject(rootDir: string, registered = false): Promise<ProjectSnapshot> {
+  const missingRoot = !(await stat(rootDir).then(() => true).catch(() => false));
+  if (missingRoot) {
+    return {
+      id: stableProjectId(rootDir),
+      name: path.basename(rootDir),
+      rootDir,
+      registered,
+      missingRoot: true,
+      provider: "codex",
+      language: "ko",
+      autoMode: "on",
+      installedVersion: null,
+      hasAgents: false,
+      hasCodex: false,
+      hasPoggn: false,
+      activeTopics: [],
+      archivedTopics: []
+    };
+  }
+
+  const manifest = await loadProjectManifest(rootDir);
+  const activeTopics = await listTopicSummaries(rootDir, "active");
+  const archivedTopics = await listTopicSummaries(rootDir, "archive");
+
+  return {
+    id: stableProjectId(rootDir),
+    name: manifest?.projectName ?? path.basename(rootDir),
+    rootDir,
+    registered,
+    missingRoot: false,
+    provider: manifest?.provider ?? "codex",
+    language: manifest?.language ?? "ko",
+    autoMode: manifest?.autoMode ?? "on",
+    installedVersion: manifest?.installedVersion ?? null,
+    hasAgents: existsSync(path.join(rootDir, "AGENTS.md")),
+    hasCodex: existsSync(path.join(rootDir, ".codex")),
+    hasPoggn: existsSync(path.join(rootDir, "poggn")),
+    activeTopics,
+    archivedTopics
+  };
+}
+
+export async function buildDashboardSnapshot(currentRootDir: string): Promise<DashboardSnapshot> {
+  const registry = await loadGlobalRegistry();
+  const dedupedPaths = new Map<string, boolean>();
+  dedupedPaths.set(currentRootDir, registry.projects.some((entry) => entry.rootDir === currentRootDir));
+  for (const entry of registry.projects) {
+    if (!dedupedPaths.has(entry.rootDir)) {
+      dedupedPaths.set(entry.rootDir, true);
+    }
+  }
+
+  const projects: ProjectSnapshot[] = [];
+  for (const [rootDir, registered] of dedupedPaths.entries()) {
+    projects.push(await analyzeProject(rootDir, registered));
+  }
+
+  const currentProject = projects.find((project) => path.resolve(project.rootDir) === path.resolve(currentRootDir)) ?? null;
+
+  return {
+    generatedAt: nowIso(),
+    currentProjectId: currentProject?.id ?? null,
+    projects
+  };
+}
+
+export function findWorkspaceRoot(startDir: string): string | null {
+  let cursor = path.resolve(startDir);
+
+  while (true) {
+    const candidate = path.join(cursor, "pnpm-workspace.yaml");
+    if (existsSync(candidate)) {
+      return cursor;
+    }
+
+    const parent = path.dirname(cursor);
+    if (parent === cursor) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    cursor = parent;
+  }
+}
+
+export async function writeDashboardSnapshotFile(filePath: string, snapshot: DashboardSnapshot): Promise<void> {
+  await writeTextFile(filePath, `${JSON.stringify(snapshot, null, 2)}\n`);
+}

+export type TemplateLanguage = "ko" | "en";
+export type TemplateAutoMode = "on" | "off";
+export type TemplateProvider = "codex";
+
+export interface TemplateInput {
+  language: TemplateLanguage;
+  autoMode: TemplateAutoMode;
+  provider: TemplateProvider;
+  version: string;
+}
+
+export interface GeneratedFileTemplate {
+  path: string;
+  content: string;
+  executable?: boolean;
+}
+
+function lines(parts: string[]): string {
+  return `${parts.join("\n")}\n`;
+}
+
+function agentsMd(input: TemplateInput): string {
+  if (input.language === "ko") {
+    return lines([
+      "# AGENTS.md",
+      "",
+      "## Codex 전용 작업 원칙",
+      "",
+      "- 모든 작업은 `.codex/add/WOKR-FLOW.md`를 따른다.",
+      "- 모든 topic은 `poggn/active/<topic>` 안에서만 진행한다.",
+      "- 구현 전에는 반드시 `proposal.md`, `plan.md`, `task.md`를 확인한다.",
+      "- 구현 단계에서는 `spec/*/*.md` 기준을 위반하지 않는다.",
+      "- 다음 단계로 넘길 때는 전체 문맥이 아니라 `state/current.md`만 우선 전달한다.",
+      "- 파일 생성/수정/삭제는 `implementation/index.md`와 `implementation/diffs/*.diff`에 기록한다.",
+      "- 검증이 통과된 topic은 `poggn/archive/<topic>`으로 이동한다.",

+      "4. `pgg-qa`",
+      "",
+      "## 금지",

+
+function newTopicSh(): string {
+  return lines([
+    "#!/usr/bin/env bash",
+    "set -euo pipefail",
+    "",
+    "if [[ $# -lt 1 || $# -gt 2 ]]; then",
+    "  echo \"usage: $0 <topic> [auto_mode:on|off]\" >&2",
+    "  exit 1",
+    "fi",
+    "",
+    "ROOT_DIR=\"$(cd \"$(dirname \"${BASH_SOURCE[0]}\")/../..\" && pwd)\"",
+    "TOPIC=\"$1\"",
+    "AUTO_MODE=\"${2:-on}\"",
+    "TOPIC_DIR=\"$ROOT_DIR/poggn/active/$TOPIC\"",
+    "TIMESTAMP=\"$(date -u +\"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ\")\"",
+    "",
+    "mkdir -p \"$TOPIC_DIR/reviews\" \"$TOPIC_DIR/state\"",
+    "",
+    "cat > \"$TOPIC_DIR/proposal.md\" <<EOF",
+    "---",
+    "pgg:",
+    "  topic: \"$TOPIC\"",
+    "  stage: \"proposal\"",
+    "  status: \"draft\"",
+    "  skill: \"pgg-add\"",
+    "  score: 0",
+    "  updated_at: \"$TIMESTAMP\"",
+    "  auto_mode: \"$AUTO_MODE\"",
+    "reactflow:",
+    "  node_id: \"proposal\"",
+    "  node_type: \"doc\"",
+    "  label: \"proposal.md\"",
+    "state:",
+    "  summary: \"사용자 요구사항을 proposal로 정리한다.\"",
+    "  next: \"pgg-plan\"",
+    "---",
+    "",
+    "# Proposal",
+    "",
+    "## 1. 제목",
+    "",
+    "$TOPIC",
+    "EOF",
+    "",
+    "cat > \"$TOPIC_DIR/reviews/proposal.review.md\" <<EOF",
+    "---",
+    "pgg:",
+    "  topic: \"$TOPIC\"",
+    "  stage: \"review\"",
+    "  status: \"draft\"",
+    "  score: 0",
+    "  updated_at: \"$TIMESTAMP\"",
+    "---",
+    "",
+    "# proposal.review",
+    "EOF",
+    "",
+    "cat > \"$TOPIC_DIR/state/current.md\" <<EOF",
+    "# Current State",
+    "",
+    "## Topic",
+    "",
+    "$TOPIC",
+    "",
+    "## Current Stage",
+    "",
+    "proposal",
+    "",
+    "## Goal",
+    "",
+    "요구사항을 명확한 proposal로 확정한다.",
+    "EOF",
+    "",
+    "printf '{\"ts\":\"%s\",\"stage\":\"proposal\",\"event\":\"topic-created\"}\\n' \"$TIMESTAMP\" > \"$TOPIC_DIR/state/history.ndjson\"",
+    "echo '{\"topic\":\"'$TOPIC'\",\"nodes\":[],\"edges\":[]}' > \"$TOPIC_DIR/workflow.reactflow.json\"",
+    "echo \"{\\\"topic\\\":\\\"$TOPIC\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"created\\\"}\""
+  ]);
+}
+
+function gateSh(): string {
+  return lines([
+    "#!/usr/bin/env bash",
+    "set -euo pipefail",
+    "",
+    "if [[ $# -ne 2 ]]; then",
+    "  echo \"usage: $0 <stage> <topic|topic_dir>\" >&2",
+    "  exit 1",
+    "fi",
+    "",
+    "ROOT_DIR=\"$(cd \"$(dirname \"${BASH_SOURCE[0]}\")/../..\" && pwd)\"",
+    "STAGE=\"$1\"",
+    "TARGET=\"$2\"",
+    "",
+    "if [[ -d \"$TARGET\" ]]; then",
+    "  TOPIC_DIR=\"$TARGET\"",
+    "else",
+    "  TOPIC_DIR=\"$ROOT_DIR/poggn/active/$TARGET\"",
+    "fi",
+    "",
+    "fail() {",
+    "  echo \"{\\\"gate\\\":\\\"fail\\\",\\\"stage\\\":\\\"$STAGE\\\",\\\"reason\\\":\\\"$1\\\"}\"",
+    "  exit 1",
+    "}",
+    "",
+    "[[ -d \"$TOPIC_DIR\" ]] || fail \"topic not found\"",
+    "",
+    "case \"$STAGE\" in",
+    "  pgg-add)",
+    "    [[ -f \"$TOPIC_DIR/proposal.md\" ]] || fail \"proposal.md is missing\"",
+    "    ;;",
+    "  pgg-plan)",
+    "    [[ -f \"$TOPIC_DIR/proposal.md\" ]] || fail \"proposal.md is missing\"",
+    "    ;;",
+    "  pgg-code)",
+    "    [[ -f \"$TOPIC_DIR/proposal.md\" ]] || fail \"proposal.md is missing\"",
+    "    [[ -f \"$TOPIC_DIR/plan.md\" ]] || fail \"plan.md is missing\"",
+    "    [[ -f \"$TOPIC_DIR/task.md\" ]] || fail \"task.md is missing\"",
+    "    find \"$TOPIC_DIR/spec\" -type f -name '*.md' | grep -q . || fail \"spec files are missing\"",
+    "    ;;",
+    "  pgg-qa)",
+    "    [[ -f \"$TOPIC_DIR/implementation/index.md\" ]] || fail \"implementation/index.md is missing\"",
+    "    ;;",
+    "  *)",
+    "    fail \"unknown stage\"",
+    "    ;;",
+    "esac",
+    "",
+    "echo \"{\\\"gate\\\":\\\"pass\\\",\\\"stage\\\":\\\"$STAGE\\\"}\""
+  ]);
+}

+#!/usr/bin/env node
+import { createInterface } from "node:readline/promises";
+import { spawn } from "node:child_process";
+import { stdin as input, stdout as output } from "node:process";
+import path from "node:path";
+import {
+  buildDashboardSnapshot,
+  findWorkspaceRoot,
+  initializeProject,
+  loadProjectManifest,
+  MANIFEST_RELATIVE_PATH,
+  type PggAutoMode,
+  type PggLanguage,
+  updateProject,
+  updateProjectAutoMode,
+  updateProjectLanguage,
+  writeDashboardSnapshotFile
+} from "@pgg/core";
+
+type CommandName = "init" | "update" | "lang" | "auto" | "dashboard";
+
+interface ParsedArgs {
+  command: CommandName | null;
+  options: Record<string, string | boolean>;
+}
+
+function parseArgs(argv: string[]): ParsedArgs {
+  const [commandToken, ...rest] = argv;
+  const command = (["init", "update", "lang", "auto", "dashboard"].includes(commandToken ?? "")
+    ? commandToken
+    : null) as CommandName | null;
+  const options: Record<string, string | boolean> = {};
+
+  for (let index = 0; index < rest.length; index += 1) {
+    const token = rest[index];
+    if (!token?.startsWith("--")) {
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    const [rawKey, inlineValue] = token.slice(2).split("=");
+    if (!rawKey) {
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    const key = rawKey;
+    if (inlineValue !== undefined) {
+      options[key] = inlineValue;
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    const next = rest[index + 1];
+    if (next && !next.startsWith("--")) {
+      options[key] = next;
+      index += 1;
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    options[key] = true;
+  }
+
+  return { command, options };
+}
+
+async function choose<T extends string>(question: string, options: Array<{ value: T; label: string }>): Promise<T> {
+  if (!process.stdin.isTTY) {
+    throw new Error(`${question} requires an interactive terminal or an explicit flag.`);
+  }
+
+  const rl = createInterface({ input, output });
+  output.write(`${question}\n`);
+  options.forEach((option, index) => {
+    output.write(`  ${index + 1}. ${option.label}\n`);
+  });
+
+  while (true) {
+    const answer = (await rl.question("> ")).trim();
+    const byIndex = Number(answer);
+    if (Number.isInteger(byIndex) && byIndex >= 1 && byIndex <= options.length) {
+      rl.close();
+      return options[byIndex - 1]!.value;
+    }
+
+    const byValue = options.find((option) => option.value === answer);
+    if (byValue) {
+      rl.close();
+      return byValue.value;
+    }
+  }
+}
+
+function printHelp(): void {
+  output.write(
+    [
+      "Usage: pgg <command> [options]",
+      "",
+      "Commands:",
+      "  pgg init [--cwd <dir>] [--provider codex] [--lang ko|en] [--auto on|off]",
+      "  pgg update [--cwd <dir>]",
+      "  pgg lang [--cwd <dir>] [--value ko|en]",
+      "  pgg auto [--cwd <dir>] [--value on|off]",
+      "  pgg dashboard [--cwd <dir>] [--host 127.0.0.1] [--port 4173] [--snapshot-only]",
+      ""
+    ].join("\n")
+  );
+}
+
+function resolveRoot(options: Record<string, string | boolean>): string {
+  const raw = typeof options.cwd === "string" ? options.cwd : process.cwd();
+  return path.resolve(raw);
+}
+
+function formatSyncResult(result: {
+  created: string[];
+  updated: string[];
+  unchanged: string[];
+  conflicts: Array<{ path: string; backupPath: string }>;
+}): string {
+  return JSON.stringify(
+    {
+      created: result.created.length,
+      updated: result.updated.length,
+      unchanged: result.unchanged.length,
+      conflicts: result.conflicts
+    },
+    null,
+    2
+  );
+}
+
+async function run(): Promise<void> {
+  const { command, options } = parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2));
+  if (!command) {
+    printHelp();
+    process.exitCode = 1;
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const rootDir = resolveRoot(options);
+
+  if (command === "init") {
+    const providerValue =
+      typeof options.provider === "string"
+        ? options.provider
+        : await choose("Choose the initial provider", [
+            { value: "codex", label: "Codex (recommended)" },
+            { value: "cancel", label: "Cancel" }
+          ]);
+
+    if (providerValue === "cancel") {
+      output.write('{"status":"cancelled"}\n');
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const provider = providerValue as "codex";
+    const language = (typeof options.lang === "string" ? options.lang : "ko") as PggLanguage;
+    const autoMode = (typeof options.auto === "string" ? options.auto : "on") as PggAutoMode;
+    const existing = await loadProjectManifest(rootDir);
+    if (existing) {
+      output.write(
+        JSON.stringify(
+          {
+            status: "already_initialized",
+            manifest: path.join(rootDir, MANIFEST_RELATIVE_PATH)
+          },
+          null,
+          2
+        ) + "\n"
+      );
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const result = await initializeProject(rootDir, {
+      provider,
+      language,
+      autoMode
+    });
+    output.write(`${formatSyncResult(result)}\n`);
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (command === "update") {
+    const result = await updateProject(rootDir);
+    output.write(`${formatSyncResult(result)}\n`);
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (command === "lang") {
+    const language =
+      (typeof options.value === "string"
+        ? options.value
+        : await choose("Choose project language", [
+            { value: "ko", label: "Korean" },
+            { value: "en", label: "English" }
+          ])) as PggLanguage;
+
+    const result = await updateProjectLanguage(rootDir, language);
+    output.write(`${formatSyncResult(result)}\n`);
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (command === "auto") {
+    const autoMode =
+      (typeof options.value === "string"
+        ? options.value
+        : await choose("Choose auto mode", [
+            { value: "on", label: "on" },
+            { value: "off", label: "off" }
+          ])) as PggAutoMode;
+
+    const result = await updateProjectAutoMode(rootDir, autoMode);
+    output.write(`${formatSyncResult(result)}\n`);
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const host = typeof options.host === "string" ? options.host : "127.0.0.1";
+  const port = Number(typeof options.port === "string" ? options.port : "4173");
+  const snapshot = await buildDashboardSnapshot(rootDir);
+  const workspaceRoot = findWorkspaceRoot(rootDir) ?? findWorkspaceRoot(path.dirname(new URL(import.meta.url).pathname));
+  const snapshotPath = workspaceRoot
+    ? path.join(workspaceRoot, "apps", "dashboard", "public", "dashboard-data.json")
+    : path.join(rootDir, ".pgg", "dashboard-data.json");
+  await writeDashboardSnapshotFile(snapshotPath, snapshot);
+
+  if (options["snapshot-only"]) {
+    output.write(`${JSON.stringify({ snapshot: snapshotPath }, null, 2)}\n`);
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (!workspaceRoot) {
+    throw new Error("Dashboard workspace root was not found. Use --snapshot-only to export data only.");
+  }
+
+  const child = spawn(
+    "pnpm",
+    ["--dir", workspaceRoot, "--filter", "@pgg/dashboard", "dev", "--", "--host", host, "--port", String(port)],
+    {
+      stdio: "inherit"
+    }
+  );
+
+  child.on("exit", (code) => {
+    process.exitCode = code ?? 0;
+  });
+}
+
+run().catch((error: unknown) => {
+  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
+  output.write(`${JSON.stringify({ error: message }, null, 2)}\n`);
+  process.exitCode = 1;
+});
",
+                    "contentType": "text/x-diff",

+import ReactDOM from "react-dom/client";

+import "./styles.css";
+import "@xyflow/react/dist/style.css";
+
+const client = new QueryClient();
+
+ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById("root")!).render(
+  <React.StrictMode>
+    <QueryClientProvider client={client}>
+      <App />
+    </QueryClientProvider>
+  </React.StrictMode>
+);
